---
title: "Joseph Henry Shorthouse"
---

## Joseph Henry Shorthouse

**Dates:** 1834-1903

### Description

novelist

### Letters

- [To Sir Walter Besant, Febry 7th [1899?][[footnote:1]]](../letters/3394_To_Sir_Walter_Besant.html)
- Letter from Feb 28th 1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
